# Kstomer

> Kstomer is the efficient, precise and no-noise CRM built for solopreneurs: pipeline, contacts, follow-ups and analytics in one tool.

Kstomer helps solo founders and consultants take control of their sales in minutes, with a Kanban pipeline, unified contact book, task reminders and lightweight analytics. Built for speed, clarity and trust.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and value proposition for solopreneurs.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to Kstomer.
